description: Author-owned Public Equity Investing source category catalog. This file reserves static category ids, labels, and preference hints for the explicit source setup flow. It does not inspect connectors, claim readiness, select routes, or create category-state.json. User-specific source preferences and source-of-truth pointers live in $XPERTAI_HOME/state/plugins/{marketplace_id}/{plugin_id}/user-context.md.

company_filings_ir.label: company filings, IR materials, and reported financials

internal_research.label: internal research notes, expert context, and team discussions

portfolio_models_trackers.label: portfolio, watchlists, models, and thesis trackers

market_data_estimates.label: market data, consensus, estimates, and ownership
